# Parrying Shield

## Description

- If you end a turn with at least 10 Block, deal 6 damage to a random enemy.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Source facts live above the divider. -->
- Improves defensive turns that already reach 10+ Block; Second Wind, Dexterity Potion, and Plating make the trigger more reliable.
- Against Skulking Colony, Parrying Shield damage can consume remaining Hardened Shell allowance at end turn, so account for the HP-loss cap before relying on it.
